description: Direct menu item display with itemized pricing in Arabic, featuring specific dish names and clear Saudi Riyal pricing to facilitate customer ordering decisions.
structural_recipe: Begin with restaurant name and location (مطعم + اسم + المنطقة + المتجر). Add 'الطلبات:' header. List 4-6 signature dishes with: (1) Arabic dish name, (2) price in SAR with 'ريال', (3) optional emoji emphasis (😍). Use line breaks between items. Include customer-friendly descriptions or special preparation notes when relevant.
why_it_works: Saudi Instagram users scroll for immediate, actionable purchasing information. Transparent pricing in local currency removes purchase friction. The structured Arabic menu format mirrors familiar restaurant ordering experiences, building trust and reducing decision time. Emojis add personality while maintaining professional menu presentation.
transplantation_caveats: Pricing must be in SAR—currency conversion undermines local relevance
Arabic dish names are essential; English-only menus reduce engagement in Saudi market
Prices should be realistic to local market expectations to avoid credibility loss
Cultural food preferences vary by region—dishes should reflect target audience taste
cultural_constraints: Avoid alcohol-related dishes or beverages in descriptions
Respect prayer times in content scheduling
Use Halal-certified or explicitly Halal-compliant language for meat dishes
